title: Rename device - close/open the Settings screen
scenario: Renamed device name does not persist after closing and reopening the Device Settings > General screen
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Tap on the device's official name field
Enter a new name for the device
Tap Done to confirm the name change
Close the Settings screen (e.g., navigate back or exit the app)
Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
expected: The new device name is displayed in the General section of Device Settings.
